titles.title: I Need You More, I Need You Lord

properties.verseOrder: v1 v2 v3 v4 v2 v3 v5 v6 v7 v8 v9 v10

verse.name: v1
verse.lines: I need you more, more than yesterday, I need you more, More than words can say, I need you more, Than ever before I need you Lord, I need you, Lord

verse.name: v2
verse.lines: More than the air I breathe, More than the song I sing More than the next heartbeat, More than anything

verse.name: v3
verse.lines: And Lord as time goes by, I'll be by your side, Cause I never want to go back to my old life

verse.name: v4
verse.lines: I need you more, more than yesterday, I need you more, More than words can say, I need you more, Than ever before I need you more, I need you, Lord

verse.name: v5
verse.lines: I need you more, more than yesterday, I need you Lord More than words can say, I need you more, God, Than ever before I need you Lord, I need you Lord

verse.name: v6
verse.lines: I need you more, God, more than yesterday I need you more, So much more than words can say I need you more, Than ever before, I need you, Lord, I need you lord

verse.name: v7
verse.lines: /: We give you the highest praise We give you the highest praise We give you the highest praise We give you the highest praise :/ x3

verse.name: v8
verse.lines: More than the air I breathe, More han the song I sing More than anything, I need you more More than the air that I breathe More than any song I could ever sing So much more than anything, I need you more

verse.name: v9
verse.lines: More than the air I breathe, More than the song I sing More than anything, I need you Lord More than the air I breathe More than the song I sing, More than anything I need you more

verse.name: v10
verse.lines: /: More than the air I breathe, More than the song I sing More than anything, I need you more :/ x3
